name: issue_refund
description: Issues a refund for a specific transaction. Requires verified user identity and exact transaction ID. Cannot be used for transactions older than 90 days or amounts over $500 without supervisor approval.

transaction_id.description: The exact ID of the transaction to refund (e.g., 'txn_12345')

name: reset_password
description: Triggers a password reset email for a user. Do not use if the user suspects account takeover; use lock_account instead.

user_email.description: The email address associated with the account

name: lock_account
description: Immediately locks a user account to prevent unauthorized access. Use this when identity theft or account compromise is suspected.

user_identifier.description: The user's email, username, or account ID

name: escalate_to_human
description: Escalates the ticket to a human agent. Use this when the request requires actions not available in these tools, involves legal threats, or exceeds authorization limits.

summary.description: A brief summary of why human intervention is needed

name: modify_subscription
description: Changes a user's subscription plan (upgrade, downgrade, or cancel).

target_plan.description: The plan to move to (if upgrading/downgrading): 'free', 'pro', 'team', 'enterprise'

name: verify_identity
description: Sends a verification challenge to the user. MUST be called before performing any destructive actions (delete, refund, modify) if the user's identity is not already definitively established in the conversation context.

target.description: The email or phone number to send the challenge to
